text.title: php-eloquent Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for php-eloquent as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Repository added for all aggregates "for consistency" but bypassed 50% of the time via Model::query() directly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Partial adoption is the worst outcome: the team gets ceremony without the swap-out benefit, and two patterns coexist. Either commit fully (no Model::query() outside the repo) or skip the repository entirely.

failure-mode.description: $user->postss returns null without raising — magic relation typos pass static analysis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run php artisan ide-helper:models -W after every model change to generate _ide_helper_models.php; Larastan needs it to catch property typos.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Nested eager loading can load the entire object graph. Cap nesting depth at 2 in code review.

failure-mode.description: Column added to migration without updating $fillable; User::create($validated) silently drops the field.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mass assignment guard ($fillable) must be updated alongside every new column; agents frequently forget the $fillable update.

failure-mode.description: unique('email') added on a soft-deleted model without a partial index.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Re-creating a previously soft-deleted user fails. Use unique('email')->whereNull('deleted_at') (Postgres) or restore-on-conflict logic.

failure-mode.description: Tests run on sqlite but app ships to MySQL/Postgres.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: JSON_EXTRACT, full-text, and case-sensitivity differ. Force the test suite onto the production DB engine in CI.

failure-mode.description: Factory state explosion — agents create per-test factories instead of factory states.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Repository over-abstraction — agents wrap Eloquent in a repo, then bypass it 50% of the time.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Either commit fully (no Model::query() outside repo) or skip the pattern.

failure-mode.description: Policy bypass via find — agents forget $this->authorize in show/update endpoints; multi-tenant data leaks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Default to findOrFail in the policy itself, not the controller.
